page_metadata.bioconda__summary: learnMSA: Learning and Aligning large Protein Families
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Multiple sequence alignment formulated as a statistical machine learning problem, where an optimal profile hidden Markov model for a potentially very large family of protein sequences is searched and an alignment is decoded.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Multiple sequence alignment formulated as a statistical machine learning problem, where an optimal profile hidden Markov model for a potentially very large family of protein sequences is searched and an alignment is decoded.
